A '''male Firrerreo''' was forced to watch the destruction of his homeworld and then held captive aboard one of [[Procurator of Justice]] [[Hethrir]]'s [[passenger freighter]]s.

When [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] happened upon the freighter while searching for her three missing children in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], she freed the man from his pod, only to be met with open hostility. The Firrereo refused to help her and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] free [[Rillao]] from her [[Torture web/Legends|torture web]], saying that he cared not for anything but his people, but help them free Rillao anyway. When finally the pair left the ship in pursuit of Lord Hethrir, he flatly refused to leave the ship.
